generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that extremists exploit. The 2024 National Security Review found that 68% of thwarted attacks relied on vulnerabilities in domestic surveillance authorities. We can't afford to wait for another tragedy to act. Responsible expansion of security powers - with proper oversight - is the only way to keep our communities safe. #NationalSecurityFirst
